message:
licensing: adopt MIT+OpenAI/Anthropic rider and align workspace metadata

Add a repository LICENSE file using the MIT text plus the OpenAI/Anthropic rider language provided by project owner guidance.

Align Cargo workspace package metadata by switching from  to , so all member crates inheriting  resolve to the rider-bearing license text.

Update README licensing surfaces to avoid contradictory claims:
- Replace the MIT badge link to opensource.org with a local rider badge link to
- Replace the plain  license section with explicit rider wording.

Scope deliberately limited to licensing metadata/docs only; no runtime code or behavior changes.

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ members = [
 [workspace.package]
 version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
-license = "MIT"
+license-file = "LICENSE"
 rust-version = "1.95"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail_rust"
 authors = ["Jeff Emanuel"]

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
